title: Sweethearts of the U.S.A.
writer: Arthur St. Claire, Sherman L. Lowe, Mary Sheldon
actors: Una Merkel, Harry Einstein, Donald Novis
plot: While working in a defense plant, Patsy (Merkel) is rendered unconscious-or at least, more unconscious than usual. While knocked out, she dreams that she's a fearless detective, teamed with tangle-tongued Parkyakarkus on the trail...
